T ^ ^ R T f m w ^ r % ) % f ^ w 3 ^ ^ ^ P n m s % w ^ 1228 GI/98 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] "(5) SRI: ^MMt "gftraf sfa *f#q-mi T&Tiran"spfrrciraT%^ 3fofrq aftqfa ^r^rr M^'MICII, wft, [TTo TJ^f-11014/4/95'^t Tjp rr^ Tjrrg- tft m^TTj Trr^ftTtrrjT;—^^ 1,5.79 ^ W ^ W ? ^ 3 ^ 1945, ^ n ^ ^ " " t f f a K *HIU I M^IH-M ( W P ^ I m ^ t A 120(3T)TIRtTa 5.3.98 ERJ f ^ T ^TOT I MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th March, 1998 G.S.R. 242 (E).—Whereas a draft certain rules further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, was published as required by sections 12 and 33 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940,(23 of 1940), in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 29th January, 1997 under the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (Department of Health), No. GSR 39 (E) dated the 29th January, 1997 inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby, before the expiry of a period of thirty days from the date on which the copies of the Official Gazette containing the said notification were made available to be public; And whereas copies of the said gazette were made available to the public on 4th February, 1997. And whereas objections and suggestions recieved from the public on the said draft rules have been considered by the Central Government; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 12 and 33 of the said Act, the Central Government, after consultation with the Drugs Technical Advisory Board, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Drugs and Cosmetics (2nd Amendment) Rules, 1998. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Drug and Cosmmetics Rules, 1945 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 3 A, for sub-rule (5), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, nammely :—- "(5) the function of the Laboratory in respect of Intra-utrine Devices and Falope Rings shall be carrried out at the Central Drugs Testing Laboratory, Thane, Maharashtra and the functions of the Director in respect of the said devices shall be exercised by the Director of the said Laboratory", [No. X.11014/4/95-DMS&PFA] RENU SAHANI DHAR, JT. SECY. Foot Note :—the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, as amended upto 1.5.1979 is contained in the publication of Mmistary of Health Family Welfare (Department of Health) containing the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and the Rules (PDGHS-61) and last amended vide GSR 120(E) dated 5.3.98.
